codeReview.summary: The feature is implemented as focused regression coverage in crates/h7cad-native-dwg/tests/read_headers.rs and matches the resolver determinism contract. The new resolver-facing test proves preserved handle/order/owner projections and observable allocation-state advancement against resolve_document(), while the end-to-end read_dwg() test proves deterministic resolved object summaries across repeated parses of the same supported fixture.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, skill file, and commit 4fa5cf8. I found no blocking or non-blocking issues: the added tests cover VAL-RESOLVE-002/005/006/007 directly, align with the current resolver architecture, and no shared-state gaps were evident from this feature review.
